form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second behind Backbeach Peter at Terang over 2180m in a NR up to 50 on March 27 at $5. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing third behind Muselet at Ballarat over 2200m in a NR 49 to 52 on April 9 at $8. Draws the pegs so he gets his chance.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 10 m finishing sixth behind Pistol Pearce at Cranbourne over 2080m in a NR 53 to 58 on March 29 at $41. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Keayang Payton at Mt Gambier over 1780m in a NR 45 to 52 on April 7 at $6.50. One of the better chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running in the home straight on the final occasion.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (Sr1) over 2180m at Stawell was 7th-14.2 at the bell, beaten 15 m by King Kasey (2:39.80) in NR 50 to 55 on April 3 at $8. At her previous start 6th (Fr3) over 1790m after showing early pace at Ararat was 5th-7.5 at the bell, beaten 12 m by The Naked Art (2:10.00) in NR 56 to 62 on March 23 at $11. Better than last start and can improve sharply.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up around the home turn before using the sprint lane.
Raced three wide with cover from the 800m mark.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr5) over 2180m at Stawell, at the bell was 7th-11.1 beaten 7 m by Lester (2:42.90) in NR 40 to 45 on April 3 at $14. Two runs back was driven from back in the field when 2nd (Fr7) over 1680m at Terang beaten 6 m by Huxham Chubb (2:05.80) in NR up to 45 on March 27 at $10. Not keen.

form.formComment: Having his second run back from a spell. Solid effort despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr5) over 2180m at Stawell was 9th-17.1 at the bell, beaten 9 m by King Kasey (2:39.80) in NR 50 to 55 on April 3 at $35. Will make his presence felt.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Utilised the sprint lane in the home straight.

form.formComment: Only had one start last preparation. Returned to racing with a handy win a big 8 m win as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr1) at Goulburn (2:05.30) beating Fenway Park in MAIDEN on March 30 at $1.50 at the bell was leading 2. Tough to beat again.

form.formComment: Resuming after five months off the scene. Finished off last campaign when a close second behind King Kasey at Ararat over 1790m in a NR 50 to 55 on November 10 at $1.55. Previous preparation first-up posted a big 4.5 m win as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr3) at Terang (2:03.00) beating Black Opal Jack in 2yo MAIDEN on October 20 at $1.35. Best form should see him go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked rounding the first turn when Ride High Captin broke gait.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Last start came from midfield and won by 1.0 m (Sr2) at Stawell (2:11.60) beating Are Weasley in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on April 3 at $7.50 at the bell was 3rd-4. Hard to leave out on current form. Each-way claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced near the 400m when Major Assassin started to give ground.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten after breaking at Mt Gambier on April 7. Two runs back 9th (Fr7) over 1800m after showing early speed and racing wide at Globe Derby Park beaten 23 m by Uptown Miss (2:15.70) in 3yo+ 1 LIFETIME WIN on March 21 at $1.30. Hard to have.
